title: Amtech B0260 10" (260mm) Diagonal Side Cutting Pliers, Side Cutters, Long Handles for Strong Cutting Force, Heat Treated Steel, Comfort Grip Handles, Cuts up to 3mm
features: DURABLE: This 10" (260mm) diagonal side cutting plier is made from drop forged, heat treated steel with a satin finish
COMFORTABLE: It has two-tone cushion grips for added comfort
EXTRA-LONG HANDLES: The angled side cutter features longer handles to provide an improved cutting force
CUTS UP TO 3MM DIAMETER: They are capable of cutting through wires up to 3mm in diameter
PORTABLE DESIGN: Compact ideal for working in confined spaces.
description: Product Description This 10" (260mm) diagonal side cutting plier is made from drop forged, heat treated steel with a satin finish. With comfortable two-tone cushion grips, the angled side cutter features longer handles to provide an improved cutting force for wires up to 3mm in diameter! Safety Warning No
